markdown:
#  What granular permissions are available for Commitments Workflows? 
##  Background 
In Procore, the term granular permissions refers to task-based privileges that can be granted to users with 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on certain tools through the users' assigned Permissions Template.  The table below shows the granular permissions that are available for Commitments Workflows.
##  Answer   
| View Workflow Templates  | Grants users the privilege to view the template of an commitment with a custom workflow.  |  
| --- | --- |  
| View Complete Workflow History as Workflow Participant  | Grants users the privilege of viewing a custom workflow's entire history when they are a participant in the commitment workflow.  |  
| View Previous Step History Only  | Grants users the privilege of viewing a commitment workflow's previous step when they are a participant in the workflow.  |  
| Can Be Workflow Manager  | Grants users the privilege of acting as a workflow manager for commitments on the project.  |  
| Can Start Workflows  | Grants users the privilege of starting custom workflows for commitments on the project. See [Start a Custom Workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/workflows-company/tutorials/start-a-workflow-on-a-project).  |  
| Configure Workflow Templates  | Grants users the privilege of configuring custom workflow templates for commitments on the project. See [Configure a Custom Workflow Template for Commitments on a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/workflows-company/tutorials/configure-a-custom-workflow-template-for-commitments-on-a-project).  |  
## See Also
  * [What granular permissions are available for Project level Workflows? (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-project-level-workflows)
  * [Which Procore tools support granular permissions?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-granular-permissions)
  * [What granular permissions are available for Payments Workflows?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-payments-workflows)


In Procore, a _Permissions Template_ is a set of _role-based permissions_ that can be assigned to one or more Procore users. The permission settings in a template define what actions users can perform and what information they can view in each Procore tool
title: What granular permissions are available for Commitments Workflows?
